nodes.label: .`SignUp Screen should have clickable link to Login screen`()
.`Nickname text field should show icon to erase when typing and do it on click`()
.`Password text field should show icon to toggle visibility and do it on click`()
.`Invalid nickname should follows with error support text and reacts on new input`()
.`Invalid password should follows with error support text and reacts on new input`()
.`Valid credentials for sign up should follows with success state`()
.`Existing nickname for sign up should follows with error about it`()
